name: Marinated Chicken Wings
recipeInstructions:
1. In a large bowl, combine the dry sherry, soy sauce, garlic powder, and ground ginger. Set aside.
2. Dissect the chicken wings into three parts each. Discard the tip end or save it for soup stock later.
3. Marinate the chicken pieces in the sherry mixture in the refrigerator for at least three hours but no longer than 24 hours.
4. Arrange 20 pieces at a time in a single layer on a heat-resistant, non-metallic serving platter.
5. Heat uncovered in a microwave oven for 12 to 14 minutes or until the chicken is well cooked. Turn the chicken pieces over after five minutes.
6. Repeat with the remaining pieces as needed.
Tip: Uncooked chicken pieces can be stored in the refrigerator for 2 to 3 days or frozen for 3 months. Cooked pieces may be reheated.
